visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a patterned blue cap, and a white t-shirt with a Roots leaf logo stands against a plain white wall. He holds a white iPhone box showing a blue device while speaking directly to the camera with a friendly expression. (2) The man turns the iPhone box around to show the back surface. He points specifically at the paper pull-tab seals at the top and bottom to explain their state, then points at a barcode area, emphasizing its physical texture. (3) A close-up shot shows the back of a blue iPhone 16 Pro. The man's finger carefully touches and moves around the three large camera lenses to inspect for dust or scratches. The lighting is bright and even. (4) The camera shows the sides and the bottom edge of the phone, highlighting the USB-C charging port. The man uses his fingers to point out specific areas of the metallic frame while rotating the device to check for cosmetic imperfections. (5) The scene shifts slightly; the man demonstrates a mobile app with a leveling interface on the screen. He points to his eye and then to the screen, explaining how to look for dead pixels or color issues on black and white backgrounds. (6) In a close-up, the man holds the phone horizontally and presses the volume buttons and the newly introduced Camera Control button on the side. He demonstrates the physical tactile feedback of the buttons while narrating the inspection process.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 買到新iPhone. [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 你一定要做這些檢查. (3) [Subtitle]: 檢查背後. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個叫沒有撕開. (5) [Subtitle]: 這個就是已經有撕開的. (6) [Subtitle]: 還有背後這邊的條碼摸一下. (7) [Subtitle]: 它是立體的哦. (8) [Subtitle]: 第一個檢查鏡頭. (9) [Subtitle]: 有沒有入塵有沒有一顆一顆的. (10) [Subtitle]: 檢查你的外觀呢. (11) [Subtitle]: 有沒有任何的刮痕. (12) [Subtitle]: 還有包含了Type C這邊呢. (13) [Subtitle]: 有沒有一樣有髒髒的. (14) [Subtitle]: 接下來教你檢查螢幕. (15) [Subtitle]: 打開你的裡面的測距儀. (16) [Subtitle]: 然后旁邊以後你看一下全黑畫面. (17) [Subtitle]: 如果有彩色的地方. (18) [Subtitle]: 或者是全白的畫面. (19) [Subtitle]: 這樣有黑點的話. (20) [Subtitle]: 那表示螢幕可能有問題哦. (21) [Subtitle]: 還有整個按鈕也要正常哦. (22) [Subtitle]: 你看音量鍵. (23) [Subtitle]: 還有相機控制按鈕.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man wears a blue patterned flat cap, clear-framed glasses, and a white t-shirt with a dark Roots logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist white wall background providing a neutral setting for the tech presentation.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and moderate speed in Traditional Chinese, sounding like a professional tech reviewer. The background music is an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track with a steady beat and synthesized melodies. No significant background noise is present. (2) The narration continues with a steady pitch and clear articulation. The speaker's tone is informative and instructional. The background music maintains its volume and rhythm, providing a consistent energy level underneath the vocal track. There are no distracting ambient sounds. (3) As the speaker describes the visual inspection, his voice maintains a positive valence. The music persists with its light electronic texture. The signal-to-noise ratio is high, indicating a studio-quality recording environment. Every word is clearly enunciated without any vocal strain. (4) The speaker's rate remains consistent as he explains the screen check. The BGM continues in a major key, reinforcing the helpful and instructional mood. There are no sudden sound effects, just the continuous interplay between the narration and the background instrumental. (5) In the final phase, the voice emphasizes the importance of checking physical buttons. The speech density is high, but well-paced. The background music continues until the end of the clip, maintaining a seamless acoustic flow throughout the entire presentation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Inspection Guide -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an educational guide for new iPhone 16 Pro buyers, demonstrating essential physical and functional checks to ensure the device is free from defects.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Tutorial nature based on product expertise rather than direct sales pitch.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly professional and well-produced short-form video tailored for social media audiences interested in consumer electronics.
